Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Golden Gate Meat Company, Inc.'s application for right to attach order and writ of attachment is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
